data.title: Lantern Pharma’s predictBBB.ai Evolves Into a Real-Time Large Quantitative Model (LQM) for Precision Molecular Intelligence — Comprehensive Small Molecule Characterization & Development Analytics Available as a Web Service to Drug Developers Globally
data.description: In Dallas, Lantern Pharma Inc. (NASDAQ: LTRN) unveiled the enhancement of predictBBB.ai into a Large Quantitative Model (LQM), powered by their RADR® AI platform. This development allows global access to a real-time quantitative intelligence engine through a single browser interface. The innovation enables pharmaceutical scientists and medicinal chemists to leverage this resource in their research and drug development efforts. This expansion marks a significant milestone in advancing precision oncology, with the tool now available worldwide.

data.title: NYSE Content Update: Bill Ackman Raises $5 Billion in Pershing Square IPO
data.description: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issues a daily advisory from the trading floor before the market opens. As of April 29, 2026, investors can access the NYSE's pre-market update for insights on market trends. This update offers valuable information to traders before the market commences and aims to provide a comprehensive analysis of the market conditions anticipated for the day. It serves as a resource for those looking to make informed decisions based on the latest data.

data.title: Parks Associates: West Leads US Regions in Energy Program Adoption, With Time-Of-Use (TOU) Rates Driving Participation
data.description: A recent study conducted by Parks Associates in Plano, Texas, on Grid-Ready Homes revealed significant regional differences in program adoption rates across the United States. The study, titled "Home Energy Insights, Assets, & Bundles," showcased limited overall participation among households in energy programs. The research, conducted in April 2026, sheds light on the need to address the disparities in uptake to ensure widespread implementation.

data.title: Live Webcast Public Auction Set for Dynaflex Products' Closing Commerce, California Tube Bending & Exhaust Manufacturing Facility, as Company Reorganizes
data.description: ThreeSixty Asset Advisors, CA Global Partners, and Fram Fram will be collaborating to auction off a range of large-diameter tube bending, forming, and fabrication equipment, with diameters between 3 inches and 10.75 inches. The auction is set for May 12, 2026. Interested parties can engage in pre-bidding starting as of now. The event is scheduled to take place in COMMERCE, California, and the announcement was made on April 29, 2026. The equipment up for sale is likely to attract significant attention given its specialized nature and the sizes available.

data.title: Coco Robotics Unveils Largest Multi-Brand Campaign on Autonomous Miami Delivery Fleet Across F1 Window
data.description: In Miami, over 100 robots operating under Coco's fleet are now adorned with brand wraps, transforming routine autonomous deliveries into a widespread out-of-home marketing avenue during a significant cultural event. This development was announced on April 29, 2026, marking Coco Robotics as the leading provider of urban robot delivery services worldwide.

data.title: The Kids With The Most Talent Are The Most Likely To Quit. A Westlake Coach Brought In The Best Solution She Could Find
data.description: On May 9th, Crocker Park in WESTLAKE, Ohio will be hosting a special event in collaboration with The Elite Competitor and the US Coaches Association. The event will feature presentations from two Olympians, a seasoned pro basketball player, and Mental Performance Coach Breanne Smedley. One of the speakers, Mary Herrick, who has accumulated 40 years of coaching experience, will also be sharing insights. This event promises to be a valuable opportunity for attendees to learn from accomplished individuals in the sports industry.

data.title: AnswerForce wins RIA Contractor's Choice Award for third year straight
data.description: A leading 24/7 live answering platform based in Portland, Oregon has once more been recognized as a top choice for property restoration professionals. AnswerForce, which caters to residential service providers, received commendation in April 29, 2026. This platform is known for its reliability and efficiency in assisting home services industry workers around the clock.

data.title: What's Going On With Penske Automotive Stock Wednesday?
data.description: Penske Automotive Group, Inc. (NYSE: PAG) released its financial results for the first quarter of 2026, exceeding expectations set by Wall Street. The company reported adjusted earnings of $3.05 per share, surpassing the anticipated $2.92 per share. This figure, however, shows a decrease from the previous year's $3.39 per share. Quarterly sales stood at $7.864 billion, significantly higher than the $7.708 billion estimate. This reflects a year-over-year increase from the $7.604 billion in the first quarter of 2025. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Travel Costs Are Up, Making Alaska Toursaver Discounts More Valuable
data.description: In Anchorage, Alaska, on April 29, 2026, a travel discount booklet known as Alaska TourSaver is gaining popularity. Due to rising costs of fuel, food, and lodging, travelers are seeking ways to save money on vacation expenses, especially in a destination as expensive as Alaska. The booklet, now in its 27th year, provides various discounts for tourists visiting the state. The official website for these offers can be found at toursaver.com.

data.title: American Warrior Association Launches National Awareness Campaign for Moral Injury, Debuts "The Journey Unbound" Documentary Series
data.description: In Fort Worth, Texas on April 29, 2026, the American Warrior Association (AWA) revealed a new nationwide communication campaign aimed at raising awareness about moral injury. This effort will include the debut of a five-part documentary series titled The Journey Unbound. The initiative is set to align with the Texas Moral program and aims to shed light on the impactful issue of moral injury.

data.title: Exeter Street Capital Partners Announces Persona Triangle Has Acquired Sheer Service and EVO Door & Window Service
data.description: Persona Triangle has recently undergone add-on acquisitions, fueling its growth in facility services. This will now operate under the name Persona Services Group. The acquisitions have been announced on April 29, 2026 in Baltimore. Exeter Street Capital Partners, the private equity affiliate of Patriot Capital Group, has played a key role in this development. This strategic move is set to significantly boost Persona Triangle's operations and expand its presence in the facility services sector.
